Sage Bot Item Code: RI107
Deep Sea Treasure Ring

Once in a while, the farthest enemy is marked for 5 sec. Whenever a marked enemy attacks, they and all enemies in a small radius around them take 100000 magic damage and are stunned for 1 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
